description: Basic valid prompt with subject + action verb in first sentence

input.prompt: [00:00] Shika surges forward, strings blazing with neon light. Camera dollies backward. [00:04] The crowd roars in unison. [00:08] Both puppets freeze mid-pose. Keep same UV purple lighting, same character appearance throughout. Audio: crowd roar building, no dialogue. ENDING FRAME [EXACT]: Shika center stage, arms raised, strings taut.
